runTitle: Vercel broad production Playwright rerun on v8.11.32 after release-gate test harness fixes
coveredSurfaces: / landing render and keyboard/axe accessibility pack
/dashboard guest access, profile menu, AI sidebar/chat, alerts/logs modals, server cards, and system resources
Dashboard AI chat starter-prompt and direct-input flows on production
Production guest flow recheck with direct dashboard fallback
Fatal browser console smoke check included in smoke.spec.ts
System start KPI probe: 3/3 success with avg 665ms
skippedSurfaces: next_devtools browser_eval direct MCP automation start path (returned Connection closed earlier in this turn)
Chrome DevTools Lighthouse/console/network re-audit was not repeated in this broad rerun
Fullscreen AI workspace, Reporter Agent, Analyst Agent advanced production flows

expertAssessments.rationale: Production AI sidebar and chat flows passed after helper stabilization, so the release-gate failures were test-harness regressions rather than AI product regressions.
Broad production rerun kept smoke/API/system-boot coverage green and the built-in console smoke check passed.
Release-gate coverage is green again, but direct Playwright MCP session start still failed earlier in the turn and required CLI fallback.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Stabilize next_devtools browser_eval start so production QA can return to full MCP-first execution without fallback notes.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage --format json --non-interactive reviewed after the broad rerun; effective usage remained 15.0518 USD while billed amount remained 0.0000 USD.

v8.11.32 alerts and logs targeted rerun log

completedImprovements.title: Production dashboard navigation helper now waits for visible dashboard markers instead of hard-failing on networkidle
completedImprovements.note: Resolved the AI sidebar flake that previously failed before sidebar assertions could start.

completedImprovements.title: Alerts/logs Playwright expectations aligned with current production modal headings and labels
completedImprovements.note: Resolved stale English/Korean label assumptions and case-sensitive log-level assertions.

completedImprovements.title: Guest flow Playwright coverage now falls back to direct dashboard navigation in production and avoids landing-card selector drift
completedImprovements.note: Resolved the release-gate failure where the guest AI toggle test captured the landing marketing card instead of the dashboard sidebar trigger.

notes: Initial broad replay in this turn surfaced stale test-harness assumptions rather than product regressions: strict networkidle waits, outdated modal label expectations, and guest-flow selector drift.
After patching the Playwright helper/spec layer, targeted reruns passed AI sidebar 4/4, alerts/logs 6/6, and guest flow 3/3 before the final broad rerun passed 53/53.
This run supersedes the earlier failing broad attempt from the same turn and restores a green broad release-gate reference on production v8.11.32.
